FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fti
  ON fti.tenant_id = ft.id
 AND fti.company_id = 1001
WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fti.lease_starttime <= NOW()
  AND fti.lease_endtime >= NOW()
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM qft_electronics_contract_sign ecs
        LEFT JOIN qft_electronics_contract ec
          ON ecs.contract_id = ec.id
         AND ec.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(ec.is_delete, 0) = 0
        LEFT JOIN qft_paper_contract pc
          ON ecs.contract_id = pc.id
         AND pc.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(pc.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE ecs.tenant_id = ft.id
          AND ecs.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(ecs.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND ecs.is_sign = 1
          AND ecs.sign_time <= NOW()
          AND (
                (ec.id IS NOT NULL AND ec.business_type = 1 AND ec.contract_type = 2)
             OR (pc.id IS NOT NULL AND pc.business_type = 1 AND pc.contract_type = 2)
          )
      )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM qft_tenants_check_out tco
        WHERE tco.tenants_id = ft.id
          AND tco.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(tco.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND tco.housing_type = 1
          AND IFNULL(tco.is_revert, 0) = 0
          AND tco.approval_state = 1
          AND tco.check_out_time <= NOW()
      );

      ON fti.tenant_id = ft.id

     AND ecs.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(ecs.is_delete, 0) = 0

    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001

            AND IFNULL(tco.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND tco.housing_type = 1
            AND IFNULL(tco.is_revert, 0) = 0
            AND tco.approval_state = 1
            AND tco.check_out_time <= NOW()
      )

    SELECT ft.id AS tenant_id
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fti
      ON fti.tenant_id = ft.id
     AND fti.company_id = 1001

      ON ecs.tenant_id = ft.id
     AND ecs.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(ecs.is_delete, 0) = 0

A_Text2SQL.generated_sql:
SELECT
    business_type,
    tenant_name,
    room_address,
    monthly_rent
FROM (
    SELECT
        '集中整租' AS business_type,
        t.name AS tenant_name,
        CONCAT(
            COALESCE(ap.property_adrr, ap.detail_address, ''),
            COALESCE(h.building, ''),
            COALESCE(h.unit_name, ''),
            COALESCE(NULLIF(r.child_room_number, ''), r.room_number, '')
        ) AS room_address,
        ti.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM qft_focus_tenants t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT i.tenant_id, i.lease_price
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_info i
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT tenant_id, MAX(id) AS max_id
            FROM qft_focus_tenants_info
            WHERE company_id = 1001
            GROUP BY tenant_id
        ) m ON i.id = m.max_id
        WHERE i.company_id = 1001
    ) ti ON ti.tenant_id = t.id
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.id = t.room_id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.name = '张三'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '整租' AS business_type,
        t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
        CONCAT(
            COALESCE(ap.property_adrr, ap.detail_address, ''),
            COALESCE(h.building, ''),
            COALESCE(h.unit_name, ''),
            COALESCE(h.door_number, '')
        ) AS room_address,
        t.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM qft_whole_tenants t
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_room r
        ON r.id = t.room_id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.tenants_name = '张三'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type,
        t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
        CONCAT(
            COALESCE(ap.property_adrr, ap.detail_address, ''),
            COALESCE(h.building, ''),
            COALESCE(h.unit_name, ''),
            COALESCE(h.door_number, ''),
            COALESCE(r.room_number, '')
        ) AS room_address,
        t.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM qft_joint_tenants t
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_room r

    LEFT JOIN (

        WHEN DATEDIFF(DATE(IFNULL(chr.end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)), CURDATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '30天内到期'
        ELSE '正常'
    END AS expiry_status
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r1.*
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal r1
    LEFT JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal r2
        ON r1.housing_id = r2.housing_id
       AND r2.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r2.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND r2.business_type = 2
       AND (
            IFNULL(r2.log_index, 0) > IFNULL(r1.log_index, 0)
            OR (IFNULL(r2.log_index, 0) = IFNULL(r1.log_index, 0) AND r2.id > r1.id)
       )
    WHERE r1.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r1.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND r1.business_type = 2
      AND r2.id IS NULL
) chr
    ON chr.housing_id = wh.id
LEFT JOIN qft_store s
    ON wh.store_id = s.id
   AND s.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_prov_city_area city
    ON wh.city_id = city.id
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
ORDER BY management_end_time ASC, wh.house_code ASC;

SELECT
    wh.id AS housing_id,
    city.name AS city_name,
    s.name AS store_name,
    wh.house_code,
    wh.housing_name AS landlord_name,
    wh.housing_phone AS landlord_phone,
    CONCAT_WS('', wh.building, wh.unit_name, wh.door_number) AS housing_address,
    CASE WHEN chr.id IS NOT NULL THEN '续约托管' ELSE '原始托管' END AS term_source,
    IFNULL(chr.start_time, wh.hosting_create_time) AS management_start_time,
    IFNULL(chr.end_time, wh.hosting_end_time) AS management_end_time,
    CONCAT(
        IFNULL(chr.contract_year, IFNULL(wh.contract_year, 0)), '年',
        IFNULL(chr.contract_month, IFNULL(wh.contract_month, 0)), '月',
        IFNULL(chr.contract_day, IFNULL(wh.contract_day, 0)), '天'
    ) AS management_term,
    DATEDIFF(DATE(IFNULL(chr.end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)), CURDATE()) AS days_to_expire
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r1.*
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal r1
    LEFT JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal r2
        ON r1.housing_id = r2.housing_id
       AND r2.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r2.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND r2.business_type = 2
       AND (
            IFNULL(r2.log_index, 0) > IFNULL(r1.log_index, 0)
            OR (IFNULL(r2.log_index, 0) = IFNULL(r1.log_index, 0) AND r2.id > r1.id)
       )
    WHERE r1.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r1.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND r1.business_type = 2
      AND r2.id IS NULL
) chr
    ON chr.housing_id = wh.id
LEFT JOIN qft_store s
    ON wh.store_id = s.id
   AND s.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_prov_city_area city
    ON wh.city_id = city.id
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
  AND DATEDIFF(DATE(IFNULL(chr.end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)), CURDATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
ORDER BY days_to_expire ASC, wh.house_code ASC;

  END AS business_type,

  b.trade_name AS tenant_name,
  b.trade_phone AS tenant_phone,
  b.bill_code,
  b.house_id,
  b.room_id,
  b.trade_date AS due_date,
  MIN(f.account_date) AS first_pay_date,
  b.total_trade_money AS receivable_amount,
  b.total_real_money AS paid_amount,
  DATEDIFF(DATE(MIN(f.account_date)), DATE(b.trade_date)) AS overdue_days

  ON b.bill_code = r.bill_code

 AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_finance f

  b.total_trade_money,

      AND jr.is_lease IN (1, 2)

   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND t.tenants_name = '张三'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '合租' AS business_type,
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone,
    h.house_code,
    CONCAT_WS('', IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''), IFNULL(h.building, ''), IFNULL(h.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(h.door_number, ''), IFNULL(r.room_number, '')) AS full_address,
    IFNULL(b.unpaid_bill_count, 0) AS unpaid_bill_count,
    IFNULL(b.should_pay_total, 0) AS should_pay_total,
    IFNULL(b.paid_total, 0) AS paid_total,
    IFNULL(b.arrears_money, 0) AS arrears_money
  FROM qft_joint_tenants t
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      tenants_id,
      SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS should_pay_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS paid_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 AND pay_status IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_bill_count,
      SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 AND pay_status IN (1, 2, 4) THEN IFNULL(debt_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS arrears_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND business_type = 3
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY tenants_id
  ) b ON b.tenants_id = t.id
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room r
    ON t.room_id = r.id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap

   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
) x
ORDER BY x.arrears_money DESC, x.business_type, x.tenant_id;

            DATE(COALESCE(chr.end_time, wh.extend_lease_end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)),
            DATE(COALESCE(wh.truste_time, wh.hosting_create_time))
        ) + 1 AS total_entrust_days,
        DATEDIFF(
            DATE(COALESCE(chr.end_time, wh.extend_lease_end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)),
            CURDATE()
        ) AS remaining_days,
        CASE
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DATE(COALESCE(chr.end_time, wh.extend_lease_end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)), CURDATE()) < 0 THEN '已到期'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DATE(COALESCE(chr.end_time, wh.extend_lease_end_time, wh.hosting_end_time)), CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
            ELSE '正常'
        END AS expire_status
    FROM qft_whole_housing wh
    LEFT JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal chr
        ON chr.housing_id = wh.id
       AND chr.business_type = 2
       AND chr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND chr.id = (
            SELECT r.id
            FROM qft_common_housing_renewal r
            WHERE r.housing_id = wh.id
              AND r.business_type = 2
              AND r.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
            ORDER BY r.log_index DESC, r.id DESC
            LIMIT 1
       )
    LEFT JOIN qft_store st
        ON wh.store_id = st.id
       AND st.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(st.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_prov_city_area ca
        ON wh.city_id = ca.id
    WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
) t
WHERE t.remaining_days BETWEEN 0 AND 30
ORDER BY t.remaining_days ASC, t.house_code ASC;
